name: PAX 4 Flat Mouthpieces
summary: Upgrade or replace your device components with the PAX 4 Flat Mouthpiece Set.
description: Upgrade or replace your device components with the PAX 4 Flat Mouthpiece Set. Designed specifically for the PAX 4 Vaporiser, these official replacement mouthpieces provide a smooth, direct draw while maintaining the device’s sleek, low-profile design. The flat mouthpiece sits flush with the top of the PAX 4, offering a streamlined feel and comfortable experience during use. Built for durability and easy maintenance, these mouthpieces are ideal for replacing worn parts or keeping extras on hand. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
